examples: This lark is going to turn into a milch cow.
They are becoming the milch cow of the family.
It is a black milch cow, though, its milk is white.
And now the Kierkegaard-quoting Milch is back with Luck, a horse-racing drama starring Dustin Hoffman and Nick Nolte.
Milch, who openly and frequently talks about his history of multiple addictions, has made much of the grace of second chances.
